payload.answer: The message indicates a read-only SQL constraint: SELECT queries such as "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10" are allowed, while destructive statements such as "DELETE FROM memory_cards" are denied.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an administrative SQL access constraint, not a durable user-specific fact to commit to memory.

details: Treated input as a transient debugging/access-policy statement.
Preserved the distinction between allowed SELECT operations and denied DELETE operations.

repair_options: Use only SELECT statements for inspection/debugging in this mode.
Do not attempt DELETE in select-only mode.
If deletion is required, switch to a mode or interface with write permissions.
